Election.Title: National Student Election 2025
Election.Description: A prototype online election platform for the INF4027W entrance assessment.

Candidates.Name: Ayanda Dlamini
Candidates.Biography: Ayanda focuses on transparent governance, youth inclusion, and accountable digital public services.

Candidates.Name: Liam Naidoo
Candidates.Biography: Liam campaigns on institutional reform, ethical technology, and open access to election information.

Candidates.Name: Thandiwe Mokoena
Candidates.Slogan: A safer future for every voter.
Candidates.Biography: Thandiwe advocates for stronger communities, responsive services, and inclusive representation.
